questions.question: Where did Paul leave Titus to put things in order?
questions.feedback: Paul left Titus in Crete to put what remained in order and appoint elders.

questions.question: Paul quotes a Cretan prophet who said Cretans are always what?
options: Liars, evil beasts, and lazy gluttons
questions.correct: Liars, evil beasts, and lazy gluttons
questions.feedback: Paul quotes a Cretan prophet describing them as liars, evil beasts, and lazy gluttons.

questions.question: Paul says an elder must not be arrogant or quick-tempered.
questions.feedback: An overseer must not be arrogant, quick-tempered, a drunkard, violent, or greedy.

questions.question: Paul calls Titus his true _____ in a common faith.
questions.feedback: Paul addresses Titus as his true child in their common faith.

questions.question: To the pure all things are pure, but to the defiled and _____ nothing is pure.
questions.feedback: To the pure all things are pure, but to the defiled and unbelieving nothing is pure.
